chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-729 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For order on office objection. For hearing of case. 19.12.2025 Mr. Noreen Shaikh advocate for petitioner. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional Advocate General Sindh along with Manzoor Ali on behalf of SSP Hyderabad, SIP Dileejan Rind on behalf of SHO PS Qasimabad and ASI Mohsin Ali Shaikh PS A-Section Latifabad. Learned A.A.G. Sindh submits statements along with certain documents, which are taken on record. The official respondents present submit that neither they have harassed the petitioner nor intend to harass in future. They further state that they are under legal obligation to discharge their duties and provide protection to every citizen of Pakistan in accordance with law. Petitioner’s counsel being satisfied seeks disposal of instant petition with direction to the police officials to provide protection to the petitioner and no harassment is made to her. In view of above, instant petition is disposed of with direction to the police officials to ensure that no harassment is caused to the petitioner and protection is provided to the petitioner as and when needed. It is made clear that this order would not come in way of any civil or criminal proceedings between the parties. JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
